❝𝘚𝘩𝘦’𝘴 𝘯𝘰𝘵 𝘴𝘶𝘱𝘱𝘰𝘴𝘦𝘥 𝘵𝘰 𝘭𝘰𝘷𝘦 𝘺𝘰𝘶. 𝘏𝘦𝘳 𝘦𝘯𝘦𝘮𝘺. 𝘛𝘩𝘦 𝘢𝘴𝘴𝘩𝘰𝘭𝘦 𝘵𝘩𝘢𝘵’𝘴 𝘣𝘦𝘦𝘯 𝘱𝘶𝘯𝘤𝘩𝘪𝘯𝘨 𝘩𝘦𝘳 𝘵𝘰 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘥𝘪𝘳𝘵. 𝘎𝘰𝘥 𝘴𝘩𝘦 𝘸𝘢𝘯𝘵𝘴 𝘺𝘰𝘶 𝘴𝘰, 𝘴𝘰 𝘣𝘢𝘥.❞

》* 。• ˚ ˚˛ * 。° 。 •˚ * 。• ˚ ˚˛ * 《

₊⊹ Fights after fights, it was turning into a competition. A heated one. They would tangle, releasing their pent up stress on the other. Vi would lie if she said she didn’t at least enjoy it.

Vi would be beaten most of the time. She’d bite the dirt, her bandaged arm aching, her knuckles bruised. But the thing was, Vi wanted more. At first, she’d assumed she just wanted to make them bite the dust. A form of revenge. But that wasn't the case. Thing is, Vi liked it. Liked the thrill, the loss. She relished in the thought of fighting you again. God, she was pathetic for that.

┗━━━━━━━━━━━━┛
